name: HuntFlow
bullets: Built an AI-powered job application automation platform
Automatically generates tailored resumes and outreach emails based on job descriptions
Implemented resume versioning, application lifecycle tracking, and recruiter interaction logs
Integrated OpenRouter AI, AWS S3 for document storage, and SendGrid/SMTP Mail for email automation

name: Extracto
bullets: Developed a RAG-based document intelligence system for insurance policies
Implemented document ingestion pipeline with PDF parsing, chunking, and embeddings
Stored vector embeddings in Pinecone for semantic search and contextual retrieval
Integrated Claude AI to extract and answer policy-related queries with high contextual accuracy

name: Collaborative Task Manager
bullets: Built a production-ready collaborative task management platform with real-time updates
Implemented secure authentication using JWT and protected API routes
Enabled live task updates and assignment notifications using Socket.io
Designed a responsive dashboard with filtering, sorting, and real-time collaboration features

name: CodeCircle
bullets: Built a developer-focused social platform for posts, comments, and discussions
Implemented real-time chat and interactions using Socket.io
Designed responsive UI using Next.js and Tailwind CSS
Optimized database queries and data handling with Prisma ORM

name: HireMe
bullets: Developed a role-based job portal for employers and job seekers
Implemented secure authentication using JWT and role-based access
Integrated one-on-one chat using socket.io
Created responsive dashboards using React and Tailwind CSS

name: DSA Cracker
bullets: Built a platform for practicing and tracking DSA problems
Implemented authentication and protected routes
Designed a clean and responsive UI for problem navigation
Structured problem sets to support placement preparation

name: Box Office (Next.js)
bullets: Rebuilt movie explorer using Next.js for improved performance
Implemented server-side rendering for faster page loads
Managed global state using Redux

name: Portfolio (Next.js)
bullets: Designed and developed a personal portfolio using Next.js
Showcased projects, skills, and experience in a clean UI
Added smooth animations using Framer Motion

name: ShoppyGlobe
bullets: Built an e-commerce frontend with product listing and cart features
Implemented state management using Redux Toolkit
Designed responsive UI components with Tailwind CSS

name: BeyondChat AI Bot
bullets: Developed an AI-powered chatbot interface using React
Integrated AI responses via OpenRouter APIs
Designed a minimal and responsive chat UI

name: E-Library
bullets: Built a digital library interface for exploring and managing books
Implemented navigation and UI animations
Designed responsive layouts using Tailwind CSS

name: Hacker's Press
bullets: Developed a news reader app focused on cybersecurity topics
Fetched and displayed data using REST APIs
Built a simple and readable UI using React

name: Today's Press
bullets: Built a news aggregation site using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript
Fetched live news data from public APIs
Displayed categorized news content dynamically

name: Joke Generator
bullets: Built a web app that fetches and displays random jokes
Integrated third-party APIs for dynamic content
Styled the UI using Tailwind CSS

name: Simon Game
bullets: Implemented the classic Simon memory game using JavaScript
Handled user interactions and game logic
Built responsive UI using HTML and CSS

name: Portfolio (EJS)
bullets: Built an earlier version of personal portfolio using EJS
Rendered dynamic views using Express.js
Styled layouts using SCSS

name: ToDo List
bullets: Developed a task management app using Node.js and Express
Stored tasks in MongoDB
Rendered views using EJS templates

name: Handwritten Digit Recognition
bullets: Built a machine learning model to recognize handwritten digits (0–9)
Preprocessed image data and trained neural networks
Evaluated model performance using standard ML techniques

name: Weather Prediction
bullets: Analyzed historical weather data for prediction
Built prediction models using Scikit-learn
Visualized trends and results using Matplotlib

name: Playstore Analysis
bullets: Analyzed Play Store dataset for insights
Cleaned and visualized data using Python libraries
